title: ToggleSprint
description: ToggleSprint is a lightweight, client-side utility mod that brings permanent sprinting capabilities to Minecraft without compromising your vanilla experience.
body:
# ToggleSprint
ToggleSprint is a lightweight, client-side utility mod designed to bring a permanent sprinting mechanic to Minecraft without intrusive or jarring gameplay alterations. Instead of constantly holding down your sprint key during long journeys or intense combat, this mod allows you to automate your movement state seamlessly.

## Features
* **Persistent Sprinting:** Once the toggle is activated, your character will automatically begin to sprint anytime you press your forward movement key.
* **Vanilla Mechanics Retained:** The mod respects native game physics. If you are sneaking, the automatic sprinting is temporarily overridden. This acts as a safety measure and prevents you from accidentally sprinting off edges while bridging or building.
* **Customizable Keybinds:** The sprint toggle is mapped to the Left Control key by default, but it can be fully remapped via a dedicated category native to the standard Minecraft controls menu.
* **HUD Integration:** Includes a clean, minimalistic status indicator on your screen to ensure you always know when your toggle sprint is armed or disabled.

## Compatibility
ToggleSprint is currently built and optimized for Minecraft 1.21.11 using the Fabric loader. Simply place the downloaded file into your mods directory, assign your preferred hotkey in the settings, and you are ready to go.
